title: Akamai Guardicore Agent Update Compliance and Version Drift (`guardicore:agent`)
spl:
index=microseg sourcetype="guardicore:agent" earliest=-4h
| stats values(agent_version) as versions dc(hostname) as hosts by datacenter
| eval unique=mvsort(versions)
| where mvcount(unique)>1
| sort -hosts
description: Version skew hints at broken deployment pipelines or dormant VMs.
value: Security maintains a single supported agent baseline.
implementation: Install the add-on, configure API polling intervals appropriate to API limits, and map assets to CMDB for enrichment lookups.

references.title: Splunkbase — Akamai Guardicore Add-on for Splunk

grandmaExplanation: We watch Guardicore data to spot unsafe inside-the-network traffic and policy gaps before attackers pivot far.
